title: Creative Thinking
abstract: Creative thinking enables AI systems to generate novel solutions beyond pattern matching and interpolation. This paper introduces divergent-convergent synthesis frameworks that combine expansive idea generation with rigorous evaluation to produce creative yet viable solutions. We demonstrate that AI systems with divergent-convergent synthesis generate 3.7× more novel solutions (measured by semantic distance from training data) while maintaining 91% of the solution quality compare
comments: 25 pages, 10 figures, submitted to arXiv on 2026-03-15
